stickerLabels.useful_tips_description: Check out recommendations for using Barteron effectively.

usefulTipsLabels.label: Useful tips
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_title: How to create an effective offer?
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_1_item_1_text: There is no need to write words like "Selling", "Offering", etc. in the title.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_1_item_2_text: If it is a product, include the most important characteristics in the title (SKU, brand, model, color, etc.).
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_1_item_3_text: If it is a service, provide a brief and precise description.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_2_item_1_text: It is very important to choose the correct category for your offer. Users often search not by keywords, but by categories.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_2_item_2_text: First, you need to determine what exactly you are offering: a product or a service.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_2_item_3_text: If it is a service, search for a suitable subcategory in the "{services_category}" category, which contains a large list of various services.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_2_item_4_text: If it is a product, search in the other categories intended for products.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_2_item_5_text: Use the search field in the category selection form. Start typing the name and check the suggested results.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_3_item_1_text: Select photos that best reflect the essence of your offer.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_3_item_2_text: Pay attention to the hint under the photo upload field. It contains information about format and quantity limits, as well as how to manage the order of photos.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_4_item_1_text: Having a video significantly increases user interest in the offer. Add a video if possible.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_4_item_2_text: Pay attention to the hint under the video upload field. It contains recommended video parameters.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_5_item_1_text: In the "{getting}" section, you can select any categories for exchange; they will be shown in the offer. To do this, click the "+" button in the input field. Below the input field, there is a list of the most frequently selected categories for quick addition.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_5_item_2_text: The price in the offer will be presented in PKOIN cryptocurrency and the fiat currency specified by the buyer in their settings. You can choose which currency to fix the price in; the price in the other currency will be recalculated based on the current exchange rate.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_6_item_1_text: There is no need to repeat the offer's title in the description.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_6_item_2_text: Try to answer all possible questions that a buyer may have.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_6_item_3_text: Specify the unit of measurement for which the price is indicated.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_6_item_4_text: You can also add links to external resources (social media, etc.) and additional contact methods.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_7_item_1_text: If you are offering a product, try to provide the buyer with several delivery options by specifying them in the "{delivery}" section. This increases the likelihood of completing a deal.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_8_item_1_text: Having a safe deal in the offer also increases the likelihood of a purchase. Read the detailed guide about this type of deal.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_8_item_2_text: To provide this option to the buyer, add the "{pkoin}" category to the exchange options list.
usefulTipsLabels.section_1_chapter_8_item_3_text: Additionally, you can choose to cover the guarantor’s fee (partially or fully) by specifying this option in the offer.
usefulTipsLabels.section_2_title: How to find out about new responses to your offers?
usefulTipsLabels.section_2_chapter_1_item_1_text: Don't miss responses to your offers — reply to clients as quickly as possible. Set up notifications to stay updated.
usefulTipsLabels.section_2_chapter_1_item_2_text: Use the "{setup_notifications}" option; it is located on the user profile screen and on the main screen. Follow the detailed instructions in the interface.
usefulTipsLabels.section_2_chapter_1_item_3_text: Several types of notifications are available: push notifications (the main method) and sending messages to external communication channels (popular messengers).
usefulTipsLabels.section_2_chapter_1_item_4_text: For privacy reasons, only a notification about the start of a new dialogue is sent to external channels, without user accounts and links to offers. All deal details remain in the encrypted Barteron chat.
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_1_item_1_text: You can make the offer search local. To do this, set a search area on the map, and then only offers within this area will be shown in all lists.
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_1_item_2_text: Click the "{search_area}" button in the top panel of the application, then open the help in the popup window by clicking the question mark button and follow the instructions provided.
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_2_item_1_text: You can get a list of offers that contain the exchange options you are interested in. To do this, use the "{exchange_options}" filter (located in the panel to the left of the offer list; in mobile mode, the panel collapses to the left).
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_2_item_2_text: For example, you want to see all offers in the "{food_products}" category where payment with PKOIN is possible. To do this, go to the "{food_products}" category, then in the "{exchange_options}" filter select the "{pkoin}" category and click "{apply_button}".
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_2_item_3_text: Similarly, you can search for various combinations of categories and exchange options that interest you.
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_3_item_1_text: Also use price and keyword filters to make your search as precise as possible. All filters can be applied simultaneously.
usefulTipsLabels.section_3_chapter_3_item_2_text: In the price filter, you can choose one of the predefined ranges or specify your own values in the "{price_from}" and "{price_to}" input fields.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_1_item_1_text: Barteron implements automatic matching of two-way and three-way exchanges.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_1_item_2_text: A two-way exchange is carried out between two participants (platform users), a three-way exchange between three.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_1_item_3_text: The Barteron algorithm searches for matches between offer categories and exchange options specified in the offers.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_1_item_4_text: You can also manually propose an exchange to Barteron participants. In this case, the user finds exchange participants themselves.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_2_item_1_text: Go to your profile page and open the active offer's tab.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_2_item_2_text: Select the offer with the item you want to exchange and click the "{find_exchange}" button.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_2_item_3_text: Barteron will perform a search and show a list of found options.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_3_item_1_text: You can also manually propose an exchange if you find a suitable offer from another platform participant.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_3_item_2_text: Open that offer and pay attention to the exchange list ("{exchange}" section); it should contain an option that you can offer for exchange.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_3_item_3_text: Click the "{propose_exchange}" button in the offer.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_3_item_4_text: A list of your offers will open; select the one suitable for exchange.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_4_item_1_text: Matching of three-way exchange options is performed automatically when you go to the main page.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_4_item_2_text: Barteron searches for chains of three offers where categories and exchange options match. This search is performed for each of your offers.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_4_item_3_text: Found exchange options will be shown automatically on the main page in the "{may_match_exchanges}" section.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_4_item_4_text: Click one of the found options to see possible exchange chains.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_4_item_5_text: Select a suitable exchange chain and click the "{propose_exchange}" button.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_5_title: Barter with three or more participants (manual matching)
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_5_item_1_text: If you find two or more offers from other users that can form an exchange chain with your item, propose a barter to the participants.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_5_item_2_text: Create a group chat and invite other participants. It is also recommended to immediately add links to the offers of the proposed exchange.
usefulTipsLabels.section_4_chapter_5_item_3_text: Agree on the possibility of the barter and its terms in the chat.

safeDealLabels.label: Safe deal
safeDealLabels.hint_for_purchase: The purchase can be made as a safe deal
safeDealLabels.validator_fee_is_paid_by_seller: Fee is paid by the seller
safeDealLabels.need_select_pkoin_to_enable_safe_deal: "Safe deal" is disabled. To enable it, add the "{pkoinCategory}" variant in the following section:
safeDealLabels.add_validator_fee_payment_options: Add an option for the seller to pay the guarantor's fee
safeDealLabels.offer_validator_fee_variant_seller_descr: The seller can cover a full guarantor's fee when using Safe Deal mode
safeDealLabels.offer_validator_fee_variant_in_half_desc: The seller can cover half of a guarantor's fee when using Safe Deal mode
safeDealLabels.faq_answer1:
It is a deal involving an intermediary, who acts as a guarantor of the deal. The buyer pays the deal amount to the guarantor, and after the seller fulfills the agreed conditions, the guarantor transfers the payment to the seller. At the same time, the guarantor withholds a pre-defined commission as a percentage of the deal amount for their service. Payment is made in PKOIN cryptocurrency.

If the conditions of the deal are not met — for example, if the buyer does not receive the goods or services — the guarantor returns the payment to the buyer. In case of a dispute between the seller and the buyer, the guarantor evaluates both sides’ arguments and makes a decision regarding the deal.
safeDealLabels.faq_answer2:
There are three possible options: 
 • Buyer, 
 • Seller, 
 • In half (Buyer and Seller).

The first option will be selected automatically if the seller has not specified in an offer that he is willing to cover the payment. If desired, the seller can specify the second or third payment option when creating an offer. In that case, the option chosen by the seller — being more favorable for the buyer — will be applied automatically.

Each guarantor sets their own commission percentage. It will be displayed in the guarantor selection list before creating a deal.
safeDealLabels.faq_question3: When a safe deal is possible?
safeDealLabels.faq_answer3: A safe deal will be available if a seller has added the "{pkoinCategory}" category to a list of exchange options in an offer and a purchase is made directly from the seller (without involving a pickup point).
safeDealLabels.faq_question4: How does a safe deal work?
safeDealLabels.faq_answer4:
When placing your order, select the "Safe Deal" option. You’ll then be asked to choose a deal guarantor. After that, a chat will open with all participants of the deal, and you’ll see a link to the safe deal page. Next, you will be automatically redirected to the safe deal page. Follow the instructions on that page.

A new link is generated for each purchase. To return to an unfinished deal later, open the chat of the deal and click the link.
safeDealLabels.validation_conditions: Guarantor's fee: {feePercent}% of the deal amount
safeDealLabels.status_2: The buyer transferred the payment to the guarantor
safeDealLabels.status_3a: The guarantor transferred the payment to the seller
safeDealLabels.status_3b: The guarantor returned the payment to the buyer
safeDealLabels.hint_for_update_status: Updating the deal status after payment may take some time (typically up to 10 minutes)
safeDealLabels.user_has_no_access: You do not have access to the deal
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_buyer_step_1: Get confirmation in the chat from the guarantor about their participation in the deal.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_buyer_step_2: Agree with the seller on the final deal amount.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_seller_step_1: Agree with the buyer on the final deal amount.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_seller_step_2: After changing the status, wait for confirmation in the chat from the guarantor that the buyer has made full payment.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_validator_step_1: Notify in the chat that you are ready to act as the deal guarantor.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_validator_step_2: Wait for the buyer to transfer the deal amount (including commission) to your account address.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_validator_step_3: After receiving full payment from the buyer, inform the seller about it.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_buyer_step_1: Wait for confirmation in the chat from the guarantor that the payment has been credited in full to their address.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_buyer_step_2: Wait for confirmation in the chat from the seller that the deal terms have been fulfilled.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_buyer_step_3: Check that the seller has fulfilled the deal terms and inform in the chat whether the terms can be considered fulfilled.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_seller_step_1: Wait for confirmation in the chat from the guarantor that the payment from the buyer has been credited in full to their address.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_seller_step_2: After confirmation from the guarantor, fulfill the deal terms with the buyer and inform about it in the chat.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_step_1: Check that the buyer’s payment has been credited in full to your account address and confirm this in the chat.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_step_2: Wait for the buyer's message in the chat about checking the fulfillment of the deal terms.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_step_3: Make a decision on the deal and either transfer the payment to the seller or return the payment to the buyer.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_info_1: If the buyer considers the deal terms fulfilled, the payment is transferred to the seller, and the guarantor retains their commission.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_info_2: If the seller refuses to fulfill the terms, the payment is returned to the buyer in full.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_info_3: If there is a dispute between the buyer and the seller about the fulfillment of the deal terms, review both parties’ arguments and make the final decision on the deal. The guarantor retains their commission only if the deal terms are fulfilled.
safeDealLabels.status_4a_role_buyer_info_1: The guarantor has confirmed that the deal terms have been fulfilled. The payment has been transferred to the seller.
safeDealLabels.status_4a_role_buyer_info_2: Please rate your purchase and leave feedback.
safeDealLabels.status_4a_role_seller_info_1: Check that the payment from the guarantor (minus the guarantor's fee) has been credited in full to your account address and confirm this in the chat.
safeDealLabels.status_4a_role_validator_info_1: Wait for confirmation in the chat from the seller that the payment has been credited in full to their address (including your commission).
safeDealLabels.status_4b_role_buyer_info_1: The guarantor has determined that the deal terms have not been fulfilled and returned the payment to your account address.
safeDealLabels.status_4b_role_buyer_info_2: Check that the payment has been credited in full and confirm this in the chat.
safeDealLabels.status_4b_role_seller_info_1: The guarantor has determined that the deal terms have not been fulfilled and returned the payment to the buyer.
safeDealLabels.status_4b_role_validator_info_1: Wait for confirmation in the chat from the buyer that the payment has been credited in full to their address.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_buyer_confirmation: I confirm that I have completed the specified actions and am ready to transfer the payment to the guarantor.
safeDealLabels.status_1_role_buyer_deal_value_field_tex: Enter the final deal amount, PKOIN
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_confirmation: I confirm that I have completed the specified actions and am ready to make a decision on the deal.
safeDealLabels.status_2_role_validator_deal_result_fiel: Have the deal terms been fulfilled?
safeDealLabels.transfer_amount_field_text: The payment amount will be: {payment} PKOIN
safeDealLabels.hint_for_payment_transfer: The payment is made in a single transaction and only here, otherwise it will not be counted! The amount will be debited from the account address.
safeDealLabels.waiting_for_payment_confirmation_step_1: Wait for the transaction to be confirmed on the blockchain. Click the "Update status" button after about 10 minutes.
safeDealLabels.waiting_for_payment_confirmation_info_1: The transaction link has been sent to the chat
safeDealLabels.status_loading_error_full_message: An error occurred while updating the status: {error}. Click the "Update status" button to try again.

referralLabels.title: Referral program
referralLabels.paragraph1: Join our referral program and invite sellers. To do this, you need to register in the program and get your referral link.
referralLabels.paragraph2: You can read the terms of the program and register for it here:

title: Title

currency_price_enabled_hint: The price in PKOIN will be updating automatically at the current rate of {currency} currency
currency_price_disabled_hint: The price in {currency} currency will be updating automatically at the current PKOIN rate
price_prefix_text: Mark the price as minimum (the word "From" will be added before the price)
